flows.subject: Quick follow-up on our conversation
flows.message:
Hi Hetvi,

Just wanted to follow up on our previous conversation. Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
Hetvi Borad

flows.subject: Checking in - wanted to update you
flows.message:
Hello,

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to check in and see how things are progressing.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best,
Hetvi
